name: Worldcoin
analysis: WLD's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 49% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at $0.6277. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $0.6663, stop $0.3889, target $1.4984 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
